data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — both AC grep checks pass. Implementation replaces ~93 lines of inline merge/rebase detection with 30-line block using ms_get_worktree_only_files from merge-state.sh. ms_filter_to_worktree_only was not used (its fail-open-on-empty conflicted with early-exit logic); ms_get_worktree_only_files used directly with manual filtering instead.
